narrative: US destroyers repel Iranian attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, driving a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges +2.69% toward $100; USD/JPY firms to 156.90 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets marginal risk-premium flows. Gold lower -0.33% at $4,696; equities -0.38%; DXY +0.24%; VIX 17.1. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (1.081% spread) remains the secondary G8 theme as Banxico's rate cut shifts focus to the RBNZ meeting on May 27.
